_TZ3000_1o6x1bl0.notes: Uses standard ZCL clusters. Battery reported via genPowerCfg cluster. Buzzer controlled via custom cluster.

_TZ3000_ja5osu5g.notes: Moes Smart Knob - supports single/double/long press via scenes cluster

_TZ3000_u3nv1jwk.notes: Each button is an endpoint (1-4). Uses genOnOff commands. Battery via genPowerCfg.

_TZ3210_fgwhjm9j.notes: GitHub Issue #44 - 20A smart plug with energy monitoring

_TZE200_rhgsbacq.notes: ZG-204ZM is a 5-in-1 sensor like Aqara FP300: presence + temp + humidity + illuminance + battery. Uses both Tuya DP (61184) and standard ZCL clusters.
